title: HySkyPVP [32x]
description: HySkyPVP [32x] CYAN pvp resource pack on 1.8+
body:
🌌 HySkyPVP x32: The Ultimate SkyBlock Experience
HySkyPVP x32 is the largest 32x resolution resource pack for Hypixel SkyBlock. Crafted by a dedicated French developer over the course of a year, it offers a high-fidelity alternative to the legendary FurfSky Reborn. ⚔️

## ✨To use all the cool features in this pack, add OptiFine

✨ Top Features
🌑 Dark GUI & PvP Aesthetics: Enjoy a sleek, dark-themed interface with hotbars and sky elements inspired by competitive PvP packs.

💎 Enhanced Blocks: Clean, high-definition textures for Mithril, Titanium, Bedrock, and Sulfur.

🐾 3D Pets: Your companions now feature stunning 3D graphics to bring your adventures to life.

📈 Dynamic Progress: Watch your bars evolve! Progress bars for skills and XP become more intricate as you level up.

🌾 The Garden & Slayers: Fully redesigned menus for Slayer quests and enhanced textures for all your farming tools.
